things.name: Meroe Pyramids
things.description: Over 200 ancient Nubian pyramids in the desert - Sudan's most spectacular ancient site

things.name: Sudan National Museum
things.description: Africa's finest collection of Nubian antiquities including reconstructed temples

things.name: Confluence of the Niles
things.description: The dramatic meeting point of the Blue and White Nile rivers

things.name: Whirling Dervishes of Omdurman
things.description: Friday afternoon Sufi ceremony with drumming and the spinning of the Qadiriyya order

things.name: Omdurman Camel Market
things.description: One of Africa's largest camel markets - held weekly on the edge of the desert

things.name: Naqa & Musawwarat Temples
things.description: Remote Meroitic temples including the Lion Temple of Apademak

things.name: Khalifa's House Museum
things.description: Home of the Mahdi's successor - museum of the Mahdist state

things.name: Nuri Pyramids
things.description: Ancient Nubian royal cemetery of 19 kings and 52 queens

things.name: Souk Omdurman
things.description: Largest market in Sudan with gold, spices, textiles and traditional crafts

things.name: Tuti Island
things.description: Idyllic farming island at the confluence of the Niles - accessible by ferry
